news.headline: Inotiv announces fiscal 2024 Q4 and full-year financial results, along with business update.
Israeli Ministry of Health approves Beyond Cancer to conduct Phase 1b trial of LV UNO with anti-PD-1 therapy in Israel. Trial to start in Q1 2025 at four sites.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda on December 3, 2024, Beyond Cancer, Ltd., a clinical-stage biotechnology company, disclosed that the Israeli Ministry of Health (IMOH) has granted approval for the utilization of Low Volume UNO (LV UNO) in a Phase 1b clinical trial. The trial will examine LV UNO in conjunction with anti-PD-1 therapy for solid tumors. It will take place at four locations in Israel, with patient recruitment commencing in Q1 of 2025.

news.headline: Pool Corporation's CFO to join Nasdaq 51st Investor Conf in London on Dec 10, 2024 with Morgan Stanley, for meetings & chat.
news.summary: In Covington, Louisiana, on December 3, 2024, Pool Corporation (Nasdaq: POOL) disclosed that Melanie M. Hart, the Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, is scheduled to partake in the Nasdaq 51st Investor Conference in London, UK, on December 10, 2024. The event, associated with Morgan Stanley, will include investor sessions and a fireside chat with significant stakeholders.

news.headline: Bionomics to present at ACNP Annual Meeting in Phoenix on ATTUNE trial results for BNC210 in PTSD, Dec 8-11.
news.summary: Bionomics Limited (Nasdaq: BNOX), a biotech company from Adelaide, Australia and Cambridge, Mass., will present Phase 2 ATTUNE trial results of BNC210 for post-traumatic stress disorder at the 63ʳᵈ Annual Meeting of ACNP in Phoenix, AZ on Dec. 8-11, 2024. The company focuses on developing allosteric ion channel modulators for CNS disorders. The presentation will be in the "Promising Targets" session at the event.

news.headline: X4 Pharmaceuticals issued 396,824 shares of common stock as inducement awards to new employees on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: X4 Pharmaceuticals recently disclosed that on December 2, 2024, they granted inducement awards to new employees under the 2019 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan. This plan is specifically for issuing equity awards to individuals not previously employed by X4. The inducement awards included options to buy a total of 396,824 shares of X4's common stock. These awards were provided as an enticement for new employees joining X4 and were sanctioned by the company's Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors in agreement with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: NeuroPace finishes enrollment in feasibility study of RNS System for Lennox-Gastaut Syndrome - a severe childhood epilepsy.
news.summary: A study funded by the NIH has finished enrolling participants and conducting implant procedures for individuals with Lennox-Gastaut Syndrome (LGS), a serious form of childhood-onset epilepsy. This feasibility study aimed to assess the effectiveness of implants in managing LGS. The study involved enrolling [number] participants and performing implant procedures on [number] individuals. LGS is recognized for its severe and disabling impact on those diagnosed at a young age.

news.headline: Latham Group to participate in Wolfe December Conference on Dec 10; CEO & CFO to host investor meetings.
news.summary: In Latham, New York, on December 3, 2024, Latham Group, Inc., the leading designer, producer, and seller of in-ground residential pools across North America, Australia, and New Zealand, shared plans for investor meetings. Scott Rajeski, the President and CEO, and Oliver Gloe, the CFO, will be conducting these meetings during the Wolfe December Small Group/1x1 Conference on December 10. The event will take place online.

news.headline: Intuit CEO to present at Nasdaq Investor Conference on Dec 10, 2024 at 5:00 a.m. PT, Nasdaq: INTU. Watch live at Intuit's investor relations website.
news.summary: Intuit Inc., a leading global financial technology platform with popular products such as Intuit TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, disclosed that its CEO, Sasan Goodarzi, is scheduled to speak at the Nasdaq 51st Investor Conference on December 10, 2024. The fireside chat is set to commence at 5:00 a.m. Pacific Time (1:00 p.m. GMT) and will be accessible through a live audio webcast on Intuit’s investor relations website at [link provided]. The company is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol INTU.

news.headline: Affirm CFO Rob O'Hare to participate in fireside chat on Dec 13, 2024 with Deutsche Bank moderator. Webcast at 11 AM ET.
news.summary: SAN FRANCISCO -- Affirm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AFRM) has reported that Rob O’Hare, the company's CFO, is scheduled to partake in a shareholder fireside chat on December 13, 2024. This event, to be moderated by Bryan Keane from Deutsche Bank, is set to commence at 11:00 AM Eastern Time. Interested parties can watch the live webcast of the event on the Company’s investor relations website at https://investors.affirm.com.

news.headline: Intuit's Marianna Tessel to present at Barclays conference on December 11, 2024. fireside chat at 1:20 p.m. PT (4:20 p.m. ET). #INTU
news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU) disclosed that Marianna Tessel, the executive vice president and general manager of Intuit’s Global Business Solutions Group, will be speaking at the Barclays 22nd Annual Global Technology Conference on December 11, 2024. The discussion is scheduled to start at 1:20 p.m. Pacific Time (4:20 p.m. Eastern Time). Intuit is a leading financial technology platform known for products like Intuit TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp.

news.headline: Company releases Q3 fiscal year 2025 results.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that approximately 10,000 jobs will be created in the upcoming fiscal year due to a new government initiative aimed at boosting the economy. The initiative includes investing $50 million in various sectors, such as technology and infrastructure. This is part of a larger effort to stimulate economic growth and reduce unemployment rates, which currently stand at 8.5%. The government hopes that these measures will lead to a 2% increase in GDP by the end of the fiscal year. Additionally, there are plans to provide training programs for workers to acquire new skills and enhance their employability in the rapidly changing job market. This comprehensive strategy is expected to have a positive impact on the overall economic outlook and well-being of the population.

news.headline: VTEX customers generated $0.9 billion in sales during Black Friday-Cyber Monday, with 21% increase in orders and 19% growth in GMV.
news.summary: VTEX, a leading commerce platform for top brands and retailers, disclosed that its clients achieved a GMV of $0.9 billion during the Black Friday-Cyber Monday week*. This marks a notable growth compared to the previous year, with orders rising by 21% and GMV increasing by 19% in FX-neutral terms and 1% in USD. The figures were impacted by foreign exchange fluctuations. The successful week saw activity across 43 countries where VTEX operates, with Electronics, Home, and Furniture sectors emerging as the top-performing verticals.

news.headline: Okta announces third quarter fiscal year 2025 results, reporting strong profitability and cash flow. CEO Todd McKinnon pleased with investments made.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Okta, Inc. (Nasdaq: OKTA), a prominent independent Identity partner, disclosed its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on October 31, 2024. Todd McKinnon, Okta's Chief Executive Officer and co-founder, expressed satisfaction with the solid Q3 results characterized by robust profitability and cash flow. McKinnon emphasized the positive impact of strategic investments in the partner ecosystem, public sector vertical, and large clients, all contributing to the company's success.

news.headline: Memorandum of Understanding allows Trump team to submit names for background checks and security clearances - Statement.
Anfield Energy Inc. shareholders approve plan of arrangement with IsoEnergy Ltd. at special meeting on Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC, December 3, 2024 - Anfield Energy Inc. (TSX.V: AEC; OTCQB: ANLDF; FRANKFURT: 0AD) has successfully received shareholder approval for the proposed plan of arrangement with IsoEnergy Ltd. The decision was made at the special meeting of shareholders on December 3, 2024.

news.headline: Research by Gloo and Barna Group shows church attendance linked to relational health & mentorship, highlighting the importance of purposeful Christian community. Statement released on Dec. 3, 2024, in Boulder, Colo. via PRNewswire.
news.summary: New research for the State of the Church initiative has been unveiled by Gloo and Barna Group, highlighting the significance of purposeful Christian community. The findings, released from Boulder, Colorado on December 3, 2024, indicate a strong emphasis on the need for strengthening this communal aspect within the Church. The initiative includes monthly research updates, shedding light on the power of Christian community.

news.headline: GRAIL granted equity awards in form of RSUs under NASDAQ Listing Rule 5635(c)(4), totaling undisclosed amount on Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Menlo Park, California, GRAIL, Inc. (Nasdaq: GRAL), a healthcare firm focused on early cancer detection, disclosed the issuance of equity awards in the form of restricted stock units ("RSUs"). These RSUs amount to a total of [insert number] units.

news.headline: Trump transition team says it enters MOU with US Justice Department.
Workday appoints Liz Centoni, EVP and Chief Customer Experience Officer at Cisco, to its Board of Directors.
news.summary: Cisco's Centoni, the EVP and Chief Customer Experience Officer, is recognized for her success in enhancing customer satisfaction. The announcement was made in Pleasanton, California on December 3, 2024. Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), a prominent company offering solutions for workforce and financial management, disclosed the news.

news.headline: S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit record highs with help from Big Tech stocks.
Tectonic Therapeutic to host KOL event on Group 2 PH-HFpEF, Dec 12, 2024, 4:00-6:00 PM ET.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Tectonic Therapeutic, Inc. (NASDAQ: TECX), a biotechnology company in Watertown, Massachusetts, specializing in therapeutic proteins and antibodies targeting GPCRs, revealed plans to hold a virtual key opinion leader event on December 12, 2024, from 4:00 PM to 6:00 PM Eastern Time. The event aims to showcase their latest advancements in the field. To participate, interested individuals can register online.

news.headline: IREN plans $300M convertible notes offering, may offer additional $45M, due 2030 to qualified buyers.
news.summary: Today, IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) (ACN 629 842 799) revealed plans to offer $300 million in convertible senior notes due 2030 (the “notes”) in a private offering to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. Additionally, IREN intends to give initial purchasers of the notes the option to buy an extra $45 million principal amount of notes within 13 days from the initial issue date.

news.headline: Mulvihill Premium Yield Fund (TSX: MPY) announces $0.06400 per unit monthly cash distribution for ETF Class, payable on Jan 8, 2025.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Mulvihill Premium Yield Fund announced a monthly cash distribution for its ETF Class registered as (TSX: MPY). The distribution totals $0.06400 per unit and is scheduled to be paid out on January 8, 2025, to unitholders who are recorded as official holders by December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Premium Global Income Split Corp. (TSX: PGIC; PGIC.PR.A) announces monthly distributions payable on Dec 31, 2024 to shareholders.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Premium Global Income Split Corp. announced their monthly distributions for shareholders. Shareholders of record on December 13, 2024, will receive the following amounts per share: $0.05 for PGIC and $0.03 for PGIC.PR.A. The payments will be made on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: FormFactor, Inc. (Nasdaq: FORM) to attend 13th Annual NYC Summit with 17 other companies on December 17th in New York.
news.summary: FormFactor, Inc., a company listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol FORM, revealed its participation in the upcoming 13th Annual NYC Summit investor conference. The event, which will take place on Tuesday, December 17th at Mastro’s Steakhouse in New York, will feature FormFactor alongside 17 other companies. This gathering serves as an opportunity for investors and industry experts to convene and discuss pertinent topics in the market.

news.headline: Mulvihill Canadian Bank Enhanced Yield ETF (TSX: CBNK) declares $0.058333 monthly distribution; payable on Jan 8, 2025 to unitholders of record on Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Toronto-based Mulvihill Canadian Bank Enhanced Yield ETF (TSX: CBNK) has announced a monthly cash distribution of $0.058333 per unit. The payment will be made on January 8, 2025, to unitholders who are recorded as such on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Parsons and Globalstar partner to provide advanced satellite communication solutions in Low Earth Orbit (LEO), supporting various sectors.
news.summary: In Chantilly, Virginia on December 3, 2024, Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN) and Globalstar (NYSE American: GSAT) revealed their exclusive collaboration aimed at aiding the public, government, and defense fields. The partnership highlighted a demonstration of Parsons’ software-based satellite communications system leveraging Globalstar’s Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellite group.

news.headline: PrairieSky Royalty declares CDN $0.25 quarterly dividend, payable on Jan 15, 2025, to shareholders on record by Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on December 3, 2024, PrairieSky Royalty Ltd. ("PrairieSky") (TSX: PSK) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of CDN $0.25 per common share. The payment will be made in cash on January 15, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as such on December 31, 2024. This dividend is classified as an "eligible dividend" for Canadian income tax considerations.

news.headline: Premium Income Corporation declares monthly distributions for December 31, 2024, to shareholders of record on December 13, 2024, in unspecified amounts. (TICKER: TSX: PIC.A; PIC.PR.A)
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Premium Income Corporation announced the declaration of monthly distributions for shareholders holding shares (TSX: PIC.A; PIC.PR.A). The distributions are set to be paid on December 31, 2024, to shareholders recorded on December 13, 2024. The specific amounts per share were also disclosed.

news.headline: $CRM Salesforce Q3 2024 Earnings
Fate Therapeutics granted 18,600 RSUs to newly-hired non-executive, each vesting over 4 years, under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Fate Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: FATE) awarded 18,600 restricted stock units (RSUs) to a newly-hired non-executive employee. The grant, approved by the Compensation Committee, is part of the Company’s efforts to bring iPSC-derived cellular immunotherapies to patients with cancer and autoimmune diseases. The RSUs will vest over four years, with 25% of the shares vesting annually, contingent on the employee's continuous employment with the company. This inducement is in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) and the Company’s Amended and Restated Inducement Equity Plan.

news.headline: The Board of Campbell’s Company elects Mick Beekhuizen as new CEO to succeed Mark Clouse, effective Feb. 1, 2025.
news.summary: The Campbell’s Company (NASDAQ: CPB) based in Camden, NJ, revealed today that Mick Beekhuizen will take over from Mark Clouse as President and CEO. Beekhuizen will assume these roles and become a Director of the company starting February 1, 2025. Until then, Beekhuizen will retain his position as President, Meals & Beverages. Campbell’s Board of Directors' Chair, Keith McLoughlin, commented on the succession plan, stating that there has been a robust CEO transition process in place.

news.headline: Sigma Lithium reaches full capacity production with a record shipment of 27,500 tons of quintuple zero green lithium to Abu Dhabi's IRH Trading Company.
news.summary: A company named Sigma Lithium Corporation, listed on TSXV/NASDAQ with the ticker symbol SGML and on BVMF as S2GM34, based in São Paulo, announced on December 3, 2024, its commitment to being a top global lithium producer for the electric vehicle industry. They strive to provide carbon-neutral and socially responsible lithium products.

news.headline: Cytokinetics granted 34,515 stock options & 22,410 RSUs to 7 new employees, inducing employment.
news.summary: In South San Francisco, California, on December 3, 2024, Cytokinetics, Incorporated revealed that it has issued stock options for the acquisition of 34,515 shares of common stock and 22,410 restricted stock units (RSUs), which will convert to common stock upon vesting, to 7 new employees who began working in November 2024. This grant serves as a significant incentive for their employment.

news.headline: Visier introduces the first AI Agent Platform to boost employee performance & productivity with a 360° view. #InnovativeAI
news.summary: Visier's Agentic AI Platform empowers managers by providing a comprehensive view of each employee's work, promoting productivity. This tool is part of Visier's "Open for Builders" initiative and allows managers to have a 360° view of employees.

news.headline: Cash App no longer offers zero fee $Cashtag transfers for Bitcoin. The company prioritizes services valued by users.
news.summary: In a statement to Decrypt, a spokesperson from Cash App stated that the company is prioritizing its efforts towards enhancing the "products and services that are most utilized and valued by Bitcoin users on the platform."

news.headline: Dunxin Financial Holdings Limited plans to change ADS ratio. Engagement in real estate and digital technology security.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Hong Kong, Dunxin Financial Holdings Limited, also known as Dunxin, a company involved in real estate operation management and investment, as well as digital technology security in Hong Kong, declared its intention to make alterations. The company, traded on OTC Pink under the symbol DXFFY, shared this news.

news.headline: Aquarion Water Company buys Ansonia, CT municipal wastewater system, biggest in New England privatization.
news.summary: Aquarion Water Company, based in Bridgeport, Connecticut, has announced the successful acquisition of the municipal wastewater system of the City of Ansonia. This deal, completed on December 3, 2024, stands as the most extensive privatization of a municipal wastewater system in all of New England. The company expressed satisfaction with the transaction, highlighting the expansion of their operations and services as a result.

news.headline: Mainz Biomed N.V. announces 1-for-40 stock split and collaboration with Thermo Fisher Scientific, focusing on cancer screening product.
news.summary: Mainz Biomed N.V. (NASDAQ:MYNZ) has announced a 1-for-40 reverse stock split effective on Dec. 3. This company focuses on early cancer detection. They recently formed a collaboration with Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE:TMO) via its subsidiary Life Technologies Corporation. Through this agreement, Mainz Biomed and Thermo Fisher will work together to develop and potentially market Mainz Biomed’s Next Generation colorectal cancer screening product. The collaboration will leverage Thermo Fisher's technologies and systems to help Mainz Biomed create proprietary assays for its mRNA-based next-generation colorectal cancer screening.

news.headline: IsoEnergy shareholders approve two resolutions at Special Meeting. TSX: ISO (up 5%) and OTCQX: ISENF (up 8%).
news.summary: In Toronto on December 3, 2024, IsoEnergy Ltd. (TSX: ISO) (OTCQX: ISENF) shared positive news about resolutions approved by shareholders. At a Special Meeting of Shareholders, the company confirmed that the resolutions were backed by an overwhelming majority of Shareholders. This significant approval signifies a strong show of support for IsoEnergy's direction and future plans.

news.headline: Cartier finds high-grade values on Globex’s Nordeau West claims near Chimo Gold Mine. Globex holds 3% GMR.
news.summary: Globex Mining Enterprises Inc. announced updates on drilling conducted by Cartier Resources Inc. on Globex's Nordeau West claims situated east of the Chimo Gold Mine. The VG10 and VG10 South structures on the Nordeau West Royalty claims have revealed new assays. Globex holds a 3% Gross Metal Royalty on these claims. The trading symbols for Globex Mining Enterprises Inc. are GMX on the Toronto Stock Exchange, G1MN on various European stock exchanges, and GLBXF on the OTCQX International in the US. Cartier Resources Inc. is listed as ECR on the TSXV and 6CA on the FSE.

news.headline: In select areas, parents are cutting down on diaper use to save more money.
MARA launches eco-friendly ASIC recycling with wind energy in Texas, saving on energy costs.
news.summary: Utilizing surplus wind power and repurposed ASICs, the Bitcoin miner aims to cut costs and reduce energy consumption at its recently acquired Texas facility. This innovative approach not only enhances sustainability but also contributes to significant savings in both energy and expenses.

news.headline: Trump's economic agenda faces challenge due to high national debt, exceeding $23 trillion.
USA's increasing debt ceiling may complicate Fed's balance-sheet reduction plans.
Burleson real estate market slows in 2024, homes taking longer to sell but prices holding firm.
news.summary: In Burleson, Texas, a recent analysis conducted by J & J Cash Home Buyers and MJ Properties shows that the real estate market is experiencing longer selling times in 2024. Despite this, homes are still being sold at robust prices, indicating a strong market. The report highlights that the average selling time has increased, but the final sales prices remain competitive, showcasing resilience in the local real estate sector. This information provides valuable insights for potential buyers and sellers in Burleson, Texas, demonstrating the market's stability despite the extended selling periods observed this year.

news.headline: Alameda's Housing Authority opens wait list for Housing Choice Voucher and Select Project-Based Voucher Programs.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Alameda, California, the Housing Authority of the City of Alameda (AHA) announced the opening of waitlists for the Housing Choice Voucher program (HCV) and specific Project-Based Voucher (PBV) programs. This initiative allows individuals to apply for housing assistance through these programs. Interested individuals can submit their applications to be added to these waitlists for potential future housing opportunities.

news.headline: Alex Mashinsky to admit guilt to 2 charges in a plea deal. Former Celsius CEO faced 7 felony counts; agreed to "non-prosecution" in 2023.
news.summary: In the United States, the ex-CEO of Celsius is facing charges for seven felony offenses connected to fraud and deceiving users. This comes after a "non-prosecution agreement" was made with the company in 2023.

news.headline: RadarRadar chosen by White River Nutrition for commodity price risk management, enhancing hedging strategies.
news.summary: RadarRadar, a software provider for managing commodity price risk, revealed that White River Nutrition (White River) has chosen its platform as a holistic tool for handling commodity risk and executing a Risk Governance Policy. The platform offers White River the capability to set up automated procedures for monitoring and assessing underlying positions, and enhancing its hedging strategies. This tool allows transparent insight into White River's positions.

news.headline: New: NVIDIA launches AI-based video search and summarization to improve video analytics, enhancing content understanding and user engagement. #tech #AI
news.summary: NVIDIA has unveiled a cutting-edge AI workflow designed for video search and summarization. This new solution aims to tackle the complexities of video analytics utilizing state-of-the-art AI technologies. The system significantly improves the comprehension of video content and enhances user engagement. The introduction of this innovation marks a major advancement in the field, promising a more efficient and effective approach to handling video data.
